hooks.command: sh -c 'root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$root" ]; then root=$(pwd); fi; hook="$root/.codex/hooks/codex-user-prompt-hook.sh"; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then bash "$hook"; fi'
hooks.commandWindows: "C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\bash.exe" -lc 'root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$root" ]; then root=$(pwd); fi; hook="$root/.codex/hooks/codex-user-prompt-hook.sh"; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then bash "$hook"; fi'
